sentences.target: Ich war gestern Zeugin beim Unfall.

translations.de: Ich war gestern Zeugin beim Unfall.
translations.en: I was a witness at the accident yesterday.
translations.fr: Hier j'ai été témoin de l'accident.
translations.zh-Hans: 我昨天目睹了那起事故。
translations.yue: 我噚日目擊咗嗰宗意外。
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi chứng kiến vụ tai nạn.
translations.nl: Gisteren was ik getuige van het ongeluk.
translations.hi: कल मैं दुर्घटना की गवाह थी.
translations.nb: I går var jeg vitne til ulykken.
translations.sv: I går var jag vittne till olyckan.
translations.ro: Ieri am fost martoră la accident.
translations.da: I går var jeg vidne til ulykken.
translations.ja: 昨日、私はその事故を目撃しました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), Präteritum, 1st person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Feminine singular nominative; predicate nominal (subject complement) with the copula.
Preposition (contraction of ‘bei dem’), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Masculine singular dative as object of the preposition ‘bei’ within the PP.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist heute Zeugin vor Gericht.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈtsɔʏɡɪn fɔʁ gəˈʁɪçt/

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist heute Zeugin vor Gericht.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈtsɔʏɡɪn fɔʁ gəˈʁɪçt/
translations.en: My sister is a witness in court today.
translations.es: Mi hermana declara hoy en el juzgado.
translations.fr: Ma sœur témoigne au tribunal aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Mia sorella testimonia oggi in tribunale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹今天在法庭作证。
translations.yue: 我妹妹今日喺法庭作證。
translations.ru: Моя сестра сегодня дает показания в суде.
translations.pt: Minha irmã depõe hoje no tribunal.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim bugün mahkemede tanıklık ediyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi hôm nay ra tòa làm chứng.
translations.nl: Mijn zus getuigt vandaag in de rechtbank.
translations.uk: Моя сестра сьогодні свідчить у суді.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem ma tanúskodik a bíróságon.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन आज अदालत में गवाही दे रही है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra dziś zeznaje w sądzie.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου σήμερα καταθέτει στο δικαστήριο.
translations.nb: Søsteren min vitner i retten i dag.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya bersaksi di pengadilan hari ini.
translations.sv: Min syster vittnar i rätten i dag.
translations.ro: Sora mea depune mărturie astăzi în instanță.
translations.cs: Moje sestra dnes svědčí u soudu.
translations.da: Min søster vidner i retten i dag.
translations.ja: 妹は今日法廷で証言します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with ‘Schwester’ (fem. nom. sg.); modifies the noun.
Feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), Präsens, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Feminine singular nominative; predicate nominal (subject complement) with the copula.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP ‘vor Gericht’ (fixed locative expression meaning ‘in court’).
Neuter singular dative without article; object of ‘vor’ within the PP.

sentences.target: Die Zeugin beschreibt den Mann sehr ruhig.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈtsɔʏɡɪn bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt deːn man zeːɐ̯ ˈʁuːɪç/

translations.de: Die Zeugin beschreibt den Mann sehr ruhig.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈtsɔʏɡɪn bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt deːn man zeːɐ̯ ˈʁuːɪç/
translations.en: The witness describes the man very calmly.
translations.es: La testigo describe al hombre con mucha calma.
translations.fr: La témoin décrit l'homme très calmement.
translations.it: La testimone descrive l'uomo con molta calma.
translations.ko: 여성 목격자는 남자에 대해 아주 침착하게 설명한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 女证人非常冷静地描述那名男子。
translations.yue: 女證人好冷靜咁形容嗰個男人。
translations.pt: A testemunha descreve o homem com muita calma.
translations.he: העדה מתארת את האיש ברוגע רב.
translations.tr: Tanık adamı çok sakin bir şekilde tarif ediyor.
translations.vi: Người làm chứng mô tả người đàn ông rất bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: De getuige beschrijft de man heel rustig.
translations.hu: A tanú nagyon nyugodtan írja le a férfit.
translations.hi: गवाह उस आदमी का बहुत शांत भाव से वर्णन करती है.
translations.el: Η μάρτυρας περιγράφει τον άντρα πολύ ήρεμα.
translations.id: Saksi itu menggambarkan pria itu dengan sangat tenang.
translations.ro: Martora îl descrie pe bărbat cu mult calm.
translations.ja: 女性の証人はその男のことをとても冷静に話している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner of ‘Zeugin’.
Feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, Präsens, 3rd person singular.
Definite article; masculine singular accusative; determiner of ‘Mann’.
Masculine singular accusative; direct object of ‘beschreibt’.
Degree adverb intensifying ‘ruhig’.
Manner adverb modifying the verb phrase (‘beschreibt’).

sentences.target: Der Polizist befragt die Zeugin am Bahnsteig.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ poliˈtsɪst bəˈfʁaːkt diː ˈtsɔʏɡɪn am ˈbaːnʃtaɪ̯k/

translations.de: Der Polizist befragt die Zeugin am Bahnsteig.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ poliˈtsɪst bəˈfʁaːkt diː ˈtsɔʏɡɪn am ˈbaːnʃtaɪ̯k/
translations.en: The police officer questions the witness on the platform.
translations.es: El policía interroga a la testigo en el andén.
translations.fr: Le policier interroge la témoin sur le quai.
translations.it: Il poliziotto interroga la testimone sul binario.
translations.zh-Hans: 警察在站台上询问女证人。
translations.yue: 警員喺月台盤問女證人。
translations.pt: O policial interroga a testemunha na plataforma.
translations.he: השוטר מתשאל את העדה על הרציף.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát hỏi nhân chứng trên sân ga.
translations.ar: الشرطي يستجوب الشاهدة على رصيف المحطة.
translations.nl: De agent ondervraagt de getuige op het perron.
translations.hu: A rendőr a peronon kihallgatja a tanút.
translations.hi: पुलिस अधिकारी प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर गवाह से पूछताछ कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο αστυνομικός ανακρίνει τη μάρτυρα στην αποβάθρα.
translations.id: Polisi itu menginterogasi saksi di peron.
translations.ro: Polițistul o audiază pe martoră pe peron.
translations.ja: 警官がホームで女性の証人に事情を聞いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine singular nominative; determiner of ‘Polizist’.
Masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, Präsens, 3rd person singular; verb with inseparable prefix ‘be-’.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of ‘Zeugin’.
Feminine singular accusative; direct object of ‘befragt’.
Preposition (contraction of ‘an dem’), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Masculine singular dative as object of the preposition ‘an’ within the PP.
